div1.entryFree: Misdoubt, vb. to mistrust: I do not m. my wife, Wiv. II, 1, 192. let this letter be read: our parson --s it, LLL IV, 3, 194. I could neither believe nor m. All's I, 3, 130. if you m. me that I am not she, III, 7, 1. the bird --eth every bush, H6C V, 6, 14. this sudden stab of rancour I m. R3 III, 2, 89. do you m. this sword? Ant. III, 7, 63.
